---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One sentence describing the feature.

## Problem it solves

What situation prompted this request? What's frustrating or missing right now?

## Proposed solution

How you imagine it working — feel free to be rough or describe it conceptually.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about, and why this one seems better.

## Additional context

Mockups, examples from other tools, links to relevant discussions, etc.

---

> **Note:** Check the [roadmap section in the README](../../README.md#roadmap) before submitting — some features are already planned. If your idea is on the roadmap, feel free to open an issue anyway to indicate interest or discuss the approach.
